name: wrong-key-signature
scenario: Sign payload with role-A's private key but claim role_id = role-B in the contract header. verifyContract should load role-B's public key and fail to verify role-A's signature.
test_logic: generateRoleKeypair(role-A), generateRoleKeypair(role-B), signContract(role-A, payload) -> override role_id to role-B -> verifyContract should fail
